{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0.0"}}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"name":"test-server","version":"0.1.0","protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"listTools","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"result":{"tools":[{"name":"echo","description":"Echoes the input message"}]}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"echo","params":{"message":"hello"}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"hello"}]}}
